cold_flu.precautions: Rest, stay hydrated, and monitor your condition. Consider taking over-the-counter pain relievers or fever reducers as directed. Consult a doctor if symptoms persist beyond a few days or worsen.

minor_ache.precautions: Rest the affected area, apply ice if swollen, and avoid strenuous activity. Over-the-counter pain relief may help. If the pain is severe or does not improve, consult a doctor.

mild_allergy.precautions: Avoid known allergens if possible. Over-the-counter antihistamines may provide relief. Seek medical help if you develop swelling in your face or throat, or have difficulty breathing.

indigestion.precautions: Eat smaller meals, avoid spicy or fatty foods, and stay upright after eating. Over-the-counter antacids may help. If symptoms persist or you experience severe abdominal pain, see a doctor.

OTHER.precautions: Your symptoms do not clearly match a known self-care category. Please consult a doctor.
